title: Legal | Piel en Armonia
description: Clear legal framework for website use, privacy, cookies, and limits of digital medical guidance.

thesis.title: Clear rules for responsible medical and digital decisions
thesis.body: Each policy states rights, limits, and responsibilities so patients know what applies in each channel.

statement.title: Legal language should guide, never confuse
statement.alt: Legal direction at Piel en Armonia

internalMessage.description: This framework protects consent, privacy, and responsible use across every public care channel.

terms.heading: Terms and conditions
terms.summary: Usage conditions for public content, remote guidance, and official communication channels.

sections.title: Website usage
items: Public information supports orientation but does not replace personalized medical consultation.
You agree to provide accurate data in forms and official channels.
Misuse of the platform may limit access to protect service integrity.

sections.title: Intellectual property
items: Text, design, and imagery belong to Piel en Armonia or authorized holders.
Full reproduction is not permitted without written authorization.
Third-party marks are referenced only for informational or comparative purposes.

privacy.heading: Privacy policy
privacy.summary: Responsible personal data handling under a minimum-exposure principle.

sections.title: Data collected
items: Contact details shared through official channels.
Technical metadata used for security and service improvement.
Clinical information only when provided for medical orientation.

sections.title: Usage and protection
items: Data supports continuity of care and operational assistance.
Technical and organizational safeguards limit unauthorized access.
Data correction or deletion requests may be submitted under applicable regulation.

cookies.heading: Cookie policy
cookies.summary: Cookie use for technical functions, aggregate analytics, and experience preferences.

sections.title: Cookie categories
items: Essential: required for navigation and stability.
Analytics: used for aggregate route measurement.
Preferences: remember interface configuration.

sections.title: Consent management
items: Non-essential cookies may be accepted or rejected.
Preferences can be updated through browser controls.
Rejecting optional cookies does not block core website access.

medical-disclaimer.heading: Medical disclaimer
medical-disclaimer.summary: Public content informs but does not replace diagnosis or personalized treatment direction.

sections.title: Limits of digital guidance
items: Public text is not a medical prescription.
Treatment decisions require individualized evaluation by qualified clinicians.
Warning signs should be addressed immediately in urgent care services.

sections.title: Shared responsibility
items: Patients should report history and symptoms accurately.
Clinical direction is defined by evidence and medical evaluation.
Adherence to the plan directly influences case progression.
